user.title: HTTP Conversation Agent
user.description: Connect Home Assistant Assist to any HTTP backend that speaks the minimal contract: POST {base_url}{endpoint_path} with JSON {"text": "..."} → JSON {"response": "...", "continue_conversation"?: bool}. Authorization: Bearer <api_key> is sent when an API key is provided. STT and TTS in the HA pipeline are unaffected.

data.api_key: API key (optional, sent as Bearer token)
data.health_path: Health-check path (optional, leave blank to skip the probe)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the backend health endpoint. Check that the service is running and that the health path returns 200, or clear it to skip the probe.

abort.already_configured: This base URL + endpoint path is already configured.
